author: greystroke
content:
I think it is important before any draconian measures are taken to force consolidation to reduce the validator set size (eg.forcefully eject 0x00 & 0x01 validators off the network), eips are adopted prior to that to minimize the concentration of the validator set that will cause. EIP-8148 directly addresses the reasons most solo stakers do not consolidate.

It reminds me a bit of the "snail issuance" debate, where proponents of the issuance reductions underappreciate its likely ramifications on further centralizing the validator set when there are mitigating eips which should be implemented prior to such a change (eg. MEV burn,  encrypted mempools).
